PORTFOLIO  ·  FILM  ·  MARKETING  ·  E-COMMERCE

Film, marketing,
and building things.

I’m a film graduate from the University of Liverpool. I’ve spent the last year travelling around New Zealand, Australia and South East Asia. Now I’m back and building a startup with a friend, Tiero. It’s an AI tool that works with universities to help students find graduate jobs and internships.

See selected work ↓ Say hello ↗  MANCHESTER, UK
Graduation day.

SKILLS

What I bring, and where I’ve proven it.

Organisation

I was the only student on my course allowed to shoot a full film, because I turned up with the whole thing planned in Milanote: shot lists, call sheets, locations and crew. On the day I ran a fixed one-day schedule around breaks, crew and a hard deadline.

Editing, DaVinci Resolve and CapCut Pro

I cut and colour-graded my own short film in DaVinci Resolve, and I turn around fast social edits in CapCut Pro for Tiero.

AI fluency, Claude Code, Cowork and Design

I built this site with Claude, run my weekly reports and task automation through it, and help design Tiero, an AI product for students.

Branding

I look after Tiero’s brand voice and social presence, and built a full mock ad campaign for a made-up pizza brand, Going Ad’s, to show how I approach it.

Microsoft Office

Through COVID I ran the spreadsheets for my dad’s garage-door business to cut waste and keep on top of cash flow. I still work in Word, Excel and PowerPoint every week.

FILM · THE PROCESS

How I make a film.

I write and direct my own independent short films, leading every stage of the pipeline. I had no budget, I gathered a team from social networking events, Facebook groups, friends and even lecturers!

Here’s how a film comes together, the bit I love most.

▶Watch the film ↗
DAVINCI RESOLVE CAPCUT PRO SCREENWRITING DIRECTING COLOUR GRADING

01

Script and Vision

The idea was born out of the idea around the conveyor belt system of therapy. I was the only student at the University of Liverpool to be allowed to make a film, due to my organisation and preparation.

02

Schedule

Shot lists, call sheets, locations and crew, the organised plan that makes the shoot calm, through an in-depth Milanote. Shown in the video on the right →

03

Shoot

On set, directing performance and camera, keeping the day moving and the vision intact. It was a fast-paced day, we only had one day agreement with the set, I had to manage breaks, lunch, personal requirements, whilst balancing a piece of work I actually wanted.

04

Edit and grade

Cutting for rhythm, then colour in DaVinci Resolve until it feels filmic and finished.

from script to grade
